_comment: MCP servers for the research orchestrator. Add via `/mcp` in Copilot CLI or copy into ~/.copilot/mcp.json. All are optional — the orchestrator falls back to Copilot's built-in web_fetch / web_search when an MCP server isn't loaded.

tavily._role: Primary web search + extraction. High-quality summarized results.

brave-search._role: Cross-checking surface for the falsification step (different result mix than Tavily).

arxiv._role: Academic paper search. No API key required.

semantic-scholar._role: Citation graph traversal — find papers that cite a given paper, and their sentiment. Used by deep_paper_search.

firecrawl._role: Deep web scraping for pages that web_fetch can't handle (JS-heavy, paywalled-but-cacheable).

fetch._role: Lightweight URL fetcher fallback for citation_verifier.

github._role: GitHub repo metrics for trend_quantifier (stars history, contributors, issues). Optional — REST API works without auth at low rates.

perplexity._role: Optional — AI-synthesized cross-check for tricky factual claims.
